data.title: Nvidia Stock Is A 'Buy On The Pullback, Says Top Analyst, Considers Earnings As 'Great But Not Extraordinary'
data.description: Deepwater's Gene Munster, shared his views on Nvidia Corporation (NASDAQ: NVDA) recent performance, suggesting it was solid but fell short of extraordinary expectations. However, he remains upbeat on the stock.

data.title: Alibaba Expands AI Intern Workforce While DeepSeek Slashes Model Prices in Market Battle
data.description: Alibaba Group offers 3,000 internships, over half in AI. Plans to invest $52.2B in AI and cloud computing. Stock down 4.61%.

data.title: Bitcoin Plummets Below $80,000, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Get Hammered As Crypto Crash Continues
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) continues to tumble, falling as low as $78,433 in early Friday morning hours amid a record streak of spot Bitcoin ETF outflows.

data.title: China's Tiangong Space Station To Host First Non-Chinese Astronaut In Coming Years, Pakistan Selected: Report
data.description: A Pakistani astronaut will fly to the Chinese space station in the coming years, making them the first foreign national to visit the station.
